title: Costa Brava · coastal landfill

classification.label: coastal_construction
classification.reasoning: The before image shows a coastal area with water (dark green/blue) and a small sandy shoreline with minimal development. The after image shows significant land reclamation and construction activity with exposed earth/sand fill material, indicating coastal construction or land reclamation project has taken place at this Lebanese coastal location.

second_opinion.reason: The AFTER image clearly shows large exposed bare/sandy areas and what appears to be reclaimed or constructed land where the BEFORE image showed dark water/vegetation, consistent with coastal construction or land reclamation rather than seasonal or tidal variation.

narration: Monitoring Costa Brava coastal landfill — 2017-04-01..2017-10-31 vs 2024-05-01..2024-09-30.
Pulled before/after composites and aligned them (same-season, cloud-masked).
Detected 56.13 ha of change at 33.8202 N, 35.4793 E (NDVI drop -0.267, BSI rise 0.213).

Classified as coastal_construction (confidence 0.92; claude). Second opinion: confirmed — The AFTER image clearly shows large exposed bare/sandy areas and what appears to be reclaimed or constructed land where the BEFORE image showed dark water/vegetation, consistent with coastal construction or land reclamation rather than seasonal or tidal variation..
Legality check: within the coastal public-domain setback.
